---
title: "Session 3: The Smarter Car — Sensors"
subtitle: "Give your car eyes"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../slides_template/assets/sdaia.scss]
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center-title-slide: true
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "../slides_template/assets/anim.svg"
      data-background-opacity: "0.08"
      data-background-size: "cover"
---

# Session 3 {.sdaia-dark background-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1C355E, #00C9A7)"}

The Smarter Car — Give your car eyes 🧠

## Agenda
